mode_of_action_summary: Chlorpyrifos inhibits acetylcholinesterase enzyme in insects, leading to accumulation of acetylcholine, continuous nerve impulse transmission, paralysis, and death. It is effective against soil and foliar pests.

active_ingredients.name: Chlorpyrifos
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Acetylcholinesterase inhibitor causing nervous system disruption

pest_behavior.soil_attack: Soil pests damage roots and reduce plant stability
pest_behavior.boring: Borers damage stems causing yield loss
pest_behavior.sap_sucking: Sucking pests weaken plants by feeding on sap

application_details.method: Apply as soil drench or foliar spray depending on pest type
application_details.coverage: Ensure thorough coverage of soil and plant base

resistance_management.advantage: Effective against a wide range of pests
resistance_management.advice: Rotate with insecticides of different groups

farmer_benefits: دیمک تے مٹی والے کیڑے ختم ہو جاندے نیں

multilingual_description.english: Broad-spectrum insecticide for control of soil and foliar pests.
multilingual_description.urdu: وسیع اثر رکھنے والی دوا جو مٹی اور پتے کے کیڑوں کو ختم کرتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: وڈے اثر والی دوا جو مٹی تے پتے والے کیڑیاں نوں ختم کردی اے۔

embedding_text: Koel 40 EC insecticide contains chlorpyrifos and is used for control of termites soil pests and borers in crops. It provides broad spectrum control and protects crops from damage.
